title: delivery worker circuit breaker state is lost on process restart
description: In delivery.rs, the CircuitBreaker lives only in memory inside run_worker(). After any process restart (crash, deploy, Docker restart), the breaker resets. A domain that had 10 consecutive failures will immediately get another 50 attempts per batch on the first poll cycle after restart, ignoring any cooldown. For large follower counts this can produce burst traffic toward failing servers on every restart.
close_reason: Accepted: ponytail comment. In-memory loss bounded by MAX_ATTEMPTS + exponential backoff.
